{{Infobox group
| name = Independents
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

''See also: [[Independents Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Independents are an alliance of various guilds that stand in opposition to the [[Imperialists]]. This coalition is composed of four primary groups: the [[Consultants]], the [[Alchemists]], the [[Greenwardens]], and the [[Luminian Order]]. While they lack the military strength of some Imperialist factions, they possess a significant economic foundation, particularly through the wealth of the alchemists and the [[Consultant's Guild]]. Their ultimate objective is to establish a new world order, though they face challenges in doing so while simultaneously defending against the influence of the [[Elders]]. The [[Consultants]] serve as a central pillar of this alliance, historically known for their absolute loyalty to [[the Emperor]]. This guild is highly organized and includes specialized roles such as [[Masons]], [[Shepherds]], [[Gardeners]], and [[Readers]]. The [[Luminian Order]] provides overt security for the alliance, while the [[Consultants]] often operate more discreetly. Despite their collective goals, the Independents have faced difficulties such as internal leadership voids, a lack of popularity within the heart of the [[Empire]], and the need to reclaim territories like [[Gray Island]].}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Independents]] are an alliance consisting of the [[Consultants]], [[Alchemists]], [[Greenwardens]], and Luminians.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultants]] are [[Independents]] who are against [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Independents]] publish news-sheets.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Independents]] are a group that cannot successfully establish a new world order if they only serve the world up to the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Independents]] are the group characterized as being opposed to the [[Imperialists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Independents]] want to establish a new world order.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Initially weakened and quiet, the Independents accepted [[Calder]]'s proposal for peace and agreed to a meeting. However, they eventually utilized an escape plan to flee, even as the [[Guild]] aligned with them within the [[Capital]]. Despite [[Calder]]'s attempts at communication, the group ignored his messages and sought to remove [[Bliss]] from the city. Following a witness account stating they struck first, the Independents were seen approaching while potentially having seized the Palace. Their involvement is also noted in relation to the [[Gardeners]], and they were later observed prying the [[Emperor's armor]] from [[Calder]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] are currently weakened and quiet.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] have accepted [[Calder]]'s proposal for peace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] agreed to a meeting.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] escaped using an escape plan.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Guild]] is on the side of the [[Independents]] in the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] must be put an end to.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] are ignoring [[Calder]]'s messages.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] were the ones who struck first in the [[Witness account]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] want [[Bliss]] out of the city.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] were coming.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Gardeners]] are mentioned in relation to the [[Independents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] may have taken the Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] are prying the [[Emperor's armor]] off [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Independents are a faction composed of various members, including alchemists and [[Greenwardens]]. This group established a fortified position within a hotel located on the outskirts of the [[Capital]]. While hand-selected members waited among crowds during peace meetings, other captured individuals had recently been released from the dungeons of the [[Imperial Palace]]. In response to their presence, the [[Consultant]] [[Guild]] gathered strength to oppose them.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Independents]] have taken over and fortified a hotel on the outskirts of the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Independents]] are a group involved in the current scenario.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Independents]] include alchemists and [[Greenwardens]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Independents]] are a faction involved in peace meetings.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Hand-selected [[Independents]] are waiting among the crowd below.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Captured [[Independents]] were released from the [[Imperial Palace]] dungeons days ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]] [[Guild]] gathered strength to oppose the [[Independents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“As you can see, the Independents are prying it off. As soon as they finish removing it, you’ll die.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
